testcase.name: testLogoutRedirectsToLogin

failure.message: Logout action should be triggerable — logout menu item not found expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Logout action should be triggerable — logout menu item not found expected [true] but found [false] at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testLogoutRedirectsToLogin(LogoutTest.java:73) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 32 stack frames

testcase.name: testLoginLinkAppearsAfterLogout

failure.message: Login or Register link should appear in the nav after logout expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Login or Register link should appear in the nav after logout expected [true] but found [false] at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testLoginLinkAppearsAfterLogout(LogoutTest.java:99) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 32 stack frames

testcase.name: testLocalStorageTokensClearedAfterLogout

failure.message: Auth tokens should be removed from localStorage after logout expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Auth tokens should be removed from localStorage after logout expected [true] but found [false] at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testLocalStorageTokensClearedAfterLogout(LogoutTest.java:147) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 32 stack frames

testcase.name: testSessionDoesNotPersistAfterLogout

failure.message: After logout, /profile should redirect to login (session must not persist) expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: After logout, /profile should redirect to login (session must not persist) expected [true] but found [false] at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testSessionDoesNotPersistAfterLogout(LogoutTest.java:189) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 32 stack frames

testcase.name: testProfileRouteGuardedWhenNotLoggedIn

failure.message: /profile should redirect unauthenticated users to /login. Landed on: https://ekartms.netlify.app/profile expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: /profile should redirect unauthenticated users to /login. Landed on: https://ekartms.netlify.app/profile expected [true] but found [false] at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testProfileRouteGuardedWhenNotLoggedIn(LogoutTest.java:205) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 32 stack frames

failure.message: /orders should redirect unauthenticated users to /login. Landed on: https://ekartms.netlify.app/orders expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: /orders should redirect unauthenticated users to /login. failure.message: /checkout should redirect unauthenticated users to /login. Landed on: https://ekartms.netlify.app/cart expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testSessionPersistsAcrossRefresh

failure.message: Logged-in session should survive a page refresh. Before: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login | After: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Logged-in session should survive a page refresh. Before: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login | After: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true] at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testSessionPersistsAcrossRefresh(LogoutTest.java:257) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 32 stack frames

testcase.name: testLogoutIdempotent

failure.message: After first logout should be on login page expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: After first logout should be on login page expected [true] but found [false] at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testLogoutIdempotent(LogoutTest.java:281) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 32 stack frames

testcase.name: testFullLoginLogoutLoginCycle

failure.message: Should be past /login after first login. URL: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Should be past /login after first login. URL: https://ekartms.netlify.app/login expected [false] but found [true] at com.ekart.tests.LogoutTest.testFullLoginLogoutLoginCycle(LogoutTest.java:341) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 32 stack frames
